title: Monumenta MMO Resource Pack
description: The official resource pack for the Monumenta Server
body:
The official resource pack for the Monumenta CTM MMO server (IP: server.playmonumenta.com). Thousands of textures for the various items you can find in Monumenta, along with custom NPCs, custom mobs, and more!

 

**Requires OptiFine or other CIT mods like CIT Resewn for main functionality. Fully supports CIT Resewn, EMF, and ETF in versions 4.3.0 and higher!**

 

As of v4.4.0 (the first update on 1.19+), enchantment glint is no longer forced disabled due to a new vanilla feature that allows you to adjust it. The intended experience of the pack is with enchantment glint OFF.

 

Fan-made guide for using the resource pack without OptiFine: https://github.com/U5B/MonumentaRP-NoOptiFine/wiki/Installing-Resource-Pack 

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable Custom Items, Emissive Textures, Custom Entity Models, and Random Entities in settings.

 

See the changelog for each version in the descriptions of the respective files.
